subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Manifest Book, sent down in truth from the dominion of God, the Most Exalted, the Most Great - verily it is a revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الکتاب المبین نزلت بالحق من جبروت الله العلی العظیم و انها لتنزیل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
